case_title: COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER DBA DIRECT MAIL CTR VS BROBECK, PHLEGER, & HARRISON LLP, SPEAR TOWER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER DBA DIRECT MAIL CTR AS TO DEFENDANT BROBECK, PHLEGER, & HARRISON LLP, SPEAR TOWER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROBECK, PHLEGER, & HARRISON LLP, SPEAR TOWER
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-20-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-07-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SEE CASE # 801835.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER DBA DIRECT MAIL CTR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROBECK, PHLEGER, & HARRISON LLP, SPEAR TOWER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
